$schema: Allowlisted file:line locations where the check:button-contrast gate would otherwise flag a violation. Each entry needs a one-sentence reason that survives review. Adding an entry means the styling is intentional and you've confirmed it reads correctly in BOTH dark and light themes.

_reasons.app/dashboard/components/BottomNav.tsx:1: 2px-tall nav indicator pill — no text rendered on top, only a hairline marker that picks up the brand emerald color. Background:--accent-emerald-text is intentional here as a color reference.
